content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text:
The device is stuck on the lock screen (com.android.systemui keyguard) and not responding to any touch input — multiple swipes, taps, and lock_screen toggles have failed to wake/unlock the device. Cannot proceed with the VLC task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device stuck on lock screen (com.android.systemui keyguard) showing dim AOD-style display with clock 17:4x; multiple swipe-up, horizontal swipe, tap, and lock_screen toggle attempts failed to unlock — touch events do not register (wait_screen_update returned no update each time). Could not launch VLC.", "screenshot_paths": ["lock screen dim AOD with time 17:4x and USB notification - device blocked at keyguard"], "failure_reason": "Device is stuck on the lock screen and unresponsive to touch input via the available MCP tools; no PIN/pattern UI shown, but swipe-to-unlock has no effect and there is no power-button/wake tool exposed, so VLC could not be opened and playlists could not be created."}

result:
The device is stuck on the lock screen (com.android.systemui keyguard) and not responding to any touch input — multiple swipes, taps, and lock_screen toggles have failed to wake/unlock the device. Cannot proceed with the VLC task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device stuck on lock screen (com.android.systemui keyguard) showing dim AOD-style display with clock 17:4x; multiple swipe-up, horizontal swipe, tap, and lock_screen toggle attempts failed to unlock — touch events do not register (wait_screen_update returned no update each time). Could not launch VLC.", "screenshot_paths": ["lock screen dim AOD with time 17:4x and USB notification - device blocked at keyguard"], "failure_reason": "Device is stuck on the lock screen and unresponsive to touch input via the available MCP tools; no PIN/pattern UI shown, but swipe-to-unlock has no effect and there is no power-button/wake tool exposed, so VLC could not be opened and playlists could not be created."}
